question: What materials do you use, and how do I choose?
answer: We work with timber, plywood, moisture-resistant MDF, polyurethane, laminate, and compact laminate. The right choice depends on the room, your budget, and the look you want. We will bring samples to your design consultation and talk through the trade-offs in durability, cost, and appearance. Moisture-resistant materials are standard for kitchens, bathrooms, and laundries.
